chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5124 of 2024 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.4085/2025. 2. For orders as to maintainability. 27.02.2025 Mr. Ghulam Mustafa, advocate for the petitioner. Syed Shohrat Rizvi, advocate for the respondent No.1. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. 1. Urgency granted. Petition is filed on behalf of entity. Petitioner appears not be not a legal entity. In view hereof, petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
